title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
scene: Across pages 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Behind him is "Pickles, the tackle demon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That is one giant fishman. I

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's no way you can win!!

summary: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
